summary: Section Settings CMS feature testing (iteration 33). All 8/8 frontend test cases PASS. All 13/13 backend tests PASS. Key features verified: (1) admin descriptions REPLACE (not append) default text - legal/news pages show titles ONCE only, (2) navigation labels come from admin DB settings, (3) visibility toggle works end-to-end — hiding nearby removes it from nav, re-enabling restores it.

1_legal_page_title_no_duplicate.details: Legal page shows 'Právní poradna nový svět' exactly ONCE in page content (nav bar occurrence is separate, expected). Old hardcoded default 'Informace a podpora pro trans komunitu' NOT present.

2_news_page_title_no_duplicate.details: News page shows 'Aktuality testuju' exactly ONCE. SectionHeader subtitle 'Novinky ze světa trans komunity' appears once (from admin subtitle). No hardcoded duplicate description below SectionHeader.

3_nav_admin_titles.details: Navigation shows admin titles: nav-legal='Právní poradna nový svět', nav-news='Aktuality testuju'. Both confirmed via data-testid selectors.

4_admin_section_settings_card.details: Admin → Content tab → section-settings-card found. 'Upravit' (edit-sections-btn) opens edit mode with Switch toggles for all 6 sections: specialists, legal, news, support, nearby, community. All section-visible-* testids confirmed.

5_visibility_toggle_nearby_off.details: Toggled nearby Switch from checked→unchecked, saved. nav-nearby REMOVED from navigation immediately after save.

6_visibility_toggle_nearby_restore.details: Re-enabled nearby Switch from unchecked→checked, saved. nav-nearby REAPPEARED in navigation. Toast 'Nastavení sekcí uloženo' confirmed save success.

7_homepage_feature_cards_admin_titles.details: Homepage feature cards show: support='Vzájemná podpora', specialists='Trans-friendly odborníci', legal='Právní poradna nový svět' (admin title!), nearby='V mém okolí'. All 4 visible when all sections visible.

8_specialists_section_header.details: Specialists page h1='Trans-friendly odborníci' (default, no admin override). Subtitle shown from context.

9_api_sections_visible_true.details: GET /api/settings/sections returns all 6 sections with visible:true (verified via backend test). After restore, all sections back to visible:true.

backend_test_coverage.TestSectionSettingsGet: 8/8 PASS - 200 status, all 6 keys, visible flag on all, all visible true, title/subtitle present, admin-overridden titles in legal/news
backend_test_coverage.TestSectionSettingsUpdate: 5/5 PASS - requires auth, visibility toggle persists, title update persists, response has sections/message, deep merge preserves defaults

critical_code_review_comments: SectionHeader.jsx correctly reads title/subtitle from sections context (admin-editable), falls back to props if not set
LegalPage.js: No hardcoded duplicate description — SectionHeader is the only heading/description element. Verified clean.
NewsPage.js: No hardcoded duplicate description — only SectionHeader renders title and subtitle. Verified clean.
Navigation.js: Properly reads from sections[key].title and filters by sections[key].visible !== false
AppSettingsContext.js deep merge correctly: DEFAULT_SECTIONS provides defaults, DB values override per-key
SectionSettingsCard.js: Switch component uses data-testid='section-visible-{key}' — confirmed working
backend settings.py: GET /api/settings/sections does per-key deep merge, visible:True default preserved

Minor: HomePage.js Community section heading uses sections?.community?.title but 'Komunita' is not in DB (shows hardcoded 'Komunita'). This is acceptable as community doesn't have a separate CMS-controlled feature card.
seed_data_creation: None. nearby visibility was toggled OFF and then restored to ON during test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Section Settings CMS fully verified. Key data in DB: legal.title='Právní poradna nový svět', news.title='Aktuality testuju'. All sections visible:true restored after testing. Navigation labels come from admin settings. Visibility toggle works end-to-end. No regressions found vs iteration 32.
rca_of_issues: N/A - All features working correctly. Previous concern about duplicate titles was from document.body.innerText including nav bar text. Actual page content (data-testid=legal-page/news-page) shows each title exactly once.
